character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A neat, bright doctor with powder as white as snow and bright, black eyes. He is described as having pleasant manners and interacts with the captain and old Taylor.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A filthy, heavy, bleared scarecrow of a pirate. He sings a song, threatens Dr. Livesey, and engages in a confrontation with him.

character_dossiers.name: old Taylor
character_dossiers.biography: A gardener mentioned in Dr. Livesey's conversation but with no detailed description or dialogue.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: A pale, tallowy creature missing two fingers of the left hand. He interacts with the captain and claims to be his shipmate.
